CustomField.formula:
IF( BI_Data__r.relationship_score__c = "Critical relationship", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFpH", "red" , 16, 50)&" "&"Critical Relationship ",
IF( BI_Data__r.relationship_score__c = "Expand contacts and improve Reply rate", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=01567000008E5U5", "orange", 16, 50 )&" "&"Expand contacts and improve Reply rate " ,
IF( BI_Data__r.relationship_score__c = "Improve Reply Rate", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xWeC", "yellow", 16, 50 )&" "&"Improve Reply Rate " ,
IF( BI_Data__r.relationship_score__c = "Healthy Relationship", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFo5", "green", 16, 50 )&" "&"Healthy Relationship ",
IF( BI_Data__r.relationship_score__c = "Expand to more contacts", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFp7", "Blue", 16, 50 )&" "&"Expand to new contacts ",
"")))))
CustomField.label: Relationship Score
